en: I'm sorry you and Angie broke up,
ko: 너랑 Angie가 헤어져서 안됐는데, 여기 앉아서 삐져 있을 거야 아니면

en: are you going to sit here sulking or are you going?
to call her? I'm not calling her, guys. Why not?
ko: 전화할 거야? 전화 안 해. 왜?

en: Because if I was her, I wouldn't take me back either.
ko: 내가 걔라도 나를 다시 받아주지 않을 거니까.

en: I was really a jerk to her.
I was selfish and I was too afraid to be vulnerable and lost her.
ko: 이기적이었고, 솔직해지는 게 너무 무서워서 걔를 잃었어.

en: John, that was beautiful.
Just tell her that. Yeah, man.
She would really appreciate hearing that.
ko: 걔도 그 말 들으면 진짜 고마워할 거야.

en: Just give her a call, buddy. Tell her what you told us. Hello?
ko: 전화 한번 해봐. 우리한테 한 말 그대로 해. 여보세요?

en: Hey, Ange. It's me.
Yeah, it's John. F*** you.
What? F*** you.
No. Why are you saying that?
ko: 안 돼. 왜 그런 말을 해?

en: Stop. What am I doing, dude?
I'm freaking out. Say what you said earlier.
ko: 나 패닉이야. 아까 한 말 해.

en: Say something else. The B-word.
ko: 다른 거 말해. B로 시작하는 거.

en: The B-word. The B-word.
ko: B로 시작하는 거. B로 시작하는 거.

en: The B-word. The B-word. The B-word.
ko: B로 시작하는 거. B로 시작하는 거. B로 시작하는 거.

en: The B-word. The B-word.
ko: B로 시작하는 거. B로 시작하는 거.

en: You said earlier.
The B vulnerable thing. Go f*** yourself. Oh no.
ko: B 취약하다는 거. 꺼져. 안 돼.

en: Nenelecta in the first place, girly. What is she saying?
ko: 애초에 선택받을 자격 없어. 걔가 뭐라는 거야?

en: You got to bail me out.
You want me to talk to her? Bail me out.
ko: 내가 대신 말해줄까? 나 좀 구해줘.

en: Talk to her. Talk to her.
Tell her I'm sorry. Please.
Hi, Angie. Hey.
Sorry. I don't know what's going...
F*** you. No.
Oh my god. F*** you, loser.
No. You mind doing it too?
Yes. I hate all of what you're working with.
ko: 응. 네 모든 게 다 싫어.

en: Don't. What is going on?
Get off the phone. It's me. Um.
I'm really sorry. Oh, dude.
It's on mute. Oh, oops.
F*** you. F*** it.
Why are we so off today? Damn it, Angie.
ko: 왜 우리 오늘 이 모양이야? 젠장, Angie.

en: She hung up on me. Wow.
Are you serious? Very mature.
Blew it again with the love of my life.
Yeah, I blew it with my last girlfriend, too.
By getting my penis stuck in her toilet.
Just like I blew it with Stevie.
Every time we had sex, I'd say, I-chi-wa-wa.
She did not like that.
But Angie wasn't like your ugly girlfriend.
ko: 근데 Angie는 니 못생긴 여자친구랑은 달라.

en: She was as warm as a summer night.
As sweet as a song. She was...
ko: 노래처럼 달콤한... 세상에, 걔가 올라오고 있어.

en: Oh my god, she's on her way up. You motherf***er!
Angie! No, no, no.
Angie! Angie!
Angie! Angie! Angie!
Angie!
Angie!
